963 OXGN_ADMSN_CD OXGN_ADMSN_CD O0110C1A Therapies: Oxygen Therapy (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received oxygen therapy days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
